case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

tool_calls.name: get_evidence
tool_calls.reasoning: Initiate broad scan of metrics across all components in the first 180-second window to identify initial anomalies

{

reasoner.analysis: Checked 30-90s currencyservice metrics/traces. Latency.p50/p90 dev=+3.2/+2.8 and workload dev=+1.8 confirm latency/workload anomalies. Traces show elevated call counts (dev=+2.1) validating increased load. Ranking retains currencyservice_latency.
